Convert UTC match time to local venue time

Source: R/team_profile.R
match_local_time.Rd

Parses a UTC start time string and converts it to local time based on the venue timezone from fixture data.

Usage

match_local_time(utc_start_time, venue_timezone = NULL)

Arguments

utc_start_time

Character string in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2026-03-05T08:30:00.000+0000").

venue_timezone

Olson timezone string (e.g. "Australia/Sydney"). If NULL or NA, defaults to "Australia/Melbourne".

Value

A formatted local time string (e.g. "2026-03-05 19:30 AEDT"), or NA if the input cannot be parsed.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
match_local_time("2026-03-05T08:30:00.000+0000", "Australia/Sydney")
match_local_time("2026-03-05T08:30:00.000+0000", "Australia/Perth")
} # }
